'''gonawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoanthropic|zoanthropic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoanthropic|zoanthropic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gonawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gonawithi|gonawithi]] || [[word:gonawiji|gonawiji]] || [[word:gonawishi|gonawishi]] || [[word:gonawiki|gonawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gonawuthuthu|gonawuthuthu]] || [[word:gonawujuju|gonawujuju]] || [[word:gonawushushu|gonawushushu]] || [[word:gonawukuku|gonawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gonawuthu|gonawuthu]] || [[word:gonawuju|gonawuju]] || [[word:gonawushu|gonawushu]] || [[word:gonawuku|gonawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gonawufthuf|gonawufthuf]] || [[word:gonawufjuf|gonawufjuf]] || [[word:gonawufshuf|gonawufshuf]] || [[word:gonawufkuf|gonawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gonawethe|gonawethe]] || [[word:gonaweje|gonaweje]] || [[word:gonaweshe|gonaweshe]] || [[word:gonaweke|gonaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gonawothotho|gonawothotho]] || [[word:gonawojojo|gonawojojo]] || [[word:gonawoshosho|gonawoshosho]] || [[word:gonawokoko|gonawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gonawotho|gonawotho]] || [[word:gonawojo|gonawojo]] || [[word:gonawosho|gonawosho]] || [[word:gonawoko|gonawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gonawofthof|gonawofthof]] || [[word:gonawofjof|gonawofjof]] || [[word:gonawofshof|gonawofshof]] || [[word:gonawofkof|gonawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfthĂŻf|gonawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfjĂŻf|gonawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfshĂŻf|gonawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfkĂŻf|gonawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|gonawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|gonawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|gonawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|gonawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfthĂŻf|gonawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfjĂŻf|gonawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfshĂŻf|gonawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfkĂŻf|gonawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfthĂŻf|gonawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfjĂŻf|gonawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfshĂŻf|gonawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gonawĂŻfkĂŻf|gonawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gonawĂŠthĂŠ|gonawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gonawĂŠjĂŠ|gonawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gonawĂŠshĂŠ|gonawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gonawĂŠkĂŠ|gonawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gonawathatha|gonawathatha]] || [[word:gonawajaja|gonawajaja]] || [[word:gonawashasha|gonawashasha]] || [[word:gonawakaka|gonawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gonawatha|gonawatha]] || [[word:gonawaja|gonawaja]] || [[word:gonawasha|gonawasha]] || [[word:gonawaka|gonawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gonawafthaf|gonawafthaf]] || [[word:gonawafjaf|gonawafjaf]] || [[word:gonawafshaf|gonawafshaf]] || [[word:gonawafkaf|gonawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gonawasha|gonawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gonawshĂ«sha|gonawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonawrosha|gonawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonawmusha|gonawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonawyasha|gonawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogonawnkshĂ«sha|gogonawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogonawnkrosha|gogonawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogonawnkmusha|gogonawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogonawnkyasha|gogonawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gonanawasha|gonanawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gonanawshĂ«sha|gonanawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonanawrosha|gonanawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonanawmusha|gonanawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonanawyasha|gonanawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogonanawnkshĂ«sha|gogonanawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogonanawnkrosha|gogonanawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogonanawnkmusha|gogonanawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogonanawnkyasha|gogonanawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:genĂŠwasha|genĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:genĂŠwshĂ«sha|genĂŠwshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:genĂŠwrosha|genĂŠwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:genĂŠwmusha|genĂŠwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:genĂŠwyasha|genĂŠwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogenĂŠwnkshĂ«sha|gogenĂŠwnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogenĂŠwnkrosha|gogenĂŠwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogenĂŠwnkmusha|gogenĂŠwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogenĂŠwnkyasha|gogenĂŠwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gonfawasha|gonfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gonfawshĂ«sha|gonfawshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonfawrosha|gonfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonfawmusha|gonfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonfawyasha|gonfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogonfawnkshĂ«sha|gogonfawnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogonfawnkrosha|gogonfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogonfawnkmusha|gogonfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogonfawnkyasha|gogonfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
